design_philosophy: A high-end, elegant Indian boutique experience. Emphasizes warm ivory backgrounds, rich maroon accents for bridal context, and generous editorial spacing to feel like a premium fashion magazine.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE A: The Tetris Grid for gallery and services to create editorial asymmetry. Use gap-8 to gap-12.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200/50
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background with 1px subtle border (border-stone-200), no heavy shadow. Hover state adds -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg.
surface_strategies.buttons: Solid primary color (Maroon) for main CTAs. Ghost or outlined with primary text for secondary.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links must explicitly shift color. Cards gently float.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_effects: Use subtle fade-up and staggering for service items and gallery images.

components_needed: About Section (Brand story with overlapping images)
Services Showcase (Tailoring, Beauty, Bridal - Bento grid)
Testimonials (Card grid with Google/Justdial rating badges)

hero.description: Woman in rich red and gold bridal outfit, serving as the main hero banner visual.

services.description: Woman in floral ethnic dress, representing designer wear/bridal collections.
Woman holding makeup brushes, representing the beauty parlour services.
Antique sewing machine, representing ladies tailoring services.

gallery_and_about.description: Red petaled flower for decorative accent background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' to install elegant icons suitable for this high-end aesthetic.
Configure tailwind.config.js to include custom colors (brandMaroon: '#800020', brandGold: '#D4AF37', brandIvory: '#FDFBF7') and the fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit'.
Implement bilingual support (Hindi/English) for key marketing text as per user request.
Do not use dark mode. Ensure all text contrast passes accessibility on the light ivory background.
Implement a sticky floating WhatsApp button on all pages with the phone number +91 98351 39191.
The Hero section must use an editorial layout (e.g., text offset on the left, large overlapping bridal image on the right) rather than a generic centered block.
Ensure the Google rating (4.6) and Justdial rating (4.5) are prominently displayed in a Trust Banner right below the hero section.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout structure (bento grids, overlapping divs) and Shadcn ONLY for interactive elements like Contact Form, Inputs, etc.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, links).
